subject: Tutorial question M
body:
Hi all, 

 

I am going through the WarpTools tutorial for Apoferritin (EMPIAR – 10491). 
I have got 8.25 A resolution following refinement with RELION and generated 
a mask using RELION_mask_create to be used in M. When I use M core for 
checking the setup, I get 6.5 A resolution. However, when I run the first 
refinement, there is hardly any improvement in the resolution (6.25 A). I 
am using identical scripts as given in the tutorial. 

Could anyone suggest troubling shooting this issue?


best,

Nav
